TestCase z44Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_p2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_p2, t1.p2, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.p2 = follow_case_p2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            if (follow_case.p2[i] == -INFINITY) {
                // Replace -Inf with the minimum (most negative) double value
                follow_case.p2[i] = -1.7976931348623157e+308;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
